title: Deterministic, format-valid, coherent mock data
statement: Seed data is generated deterministically (seeded PRNG, no Math.random); re-running the generator yields byte-identical SQL. Generated identifiers are format-valid: CPF/CNPJ with valid mod-11 check digits, placas in Mercosul (LLLNLNN) or legacy (LLLNNNN) form, 17-char VIN chassis, 11-digit RENAVAM. Cross-entity references are coherent (infraction → real vehicle/driver; indicator columns agree with child rows; código_* values exist in ref_* tables).
rationale: Consumers validate these identifiers with real Brazilian format checks; invalid data would be rejected before reaching business logic. Determinism makes seeds reviewable (committed SQL) and lets CI assert no drift.
